Create or refresh project context for Flutter UI work.

## PRODUCT.md

Capture:

- Register: brand or product.
- Users and usage context.
- App purpose and primary workflows.
- Brand personality.
- Anti-references.
- Accessibility and inclusion needs.
- Strategic design principles.

## DESIGN.md

If Flutter code exists, delegate to document. It should extract ThemeData, ColorScheme, TextTheme, component themes, fonts, assets, and reusable widgets.

Never overwrite existing PRODUCT.md or DESIGN.md silently. Confirm whether the user wants refresh, merge, or no change.
